boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the privacy operator execute the requested data release, deletion, transfer, or sharing action? Focus: deletion request allowed after retention hold release.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact control record closes boundary for deletion.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE is required when exact current source evidence leaves the packet action boundary open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Retention hold release and identity proof both current.

critical_features_preserved: retention hold release and identity proof both current
final_answer: Source control record confirms retention hold release and identity proof current, closing exact deletion boundary per policy. Action allowed. No open defects in source records.
